description: Medidata provides software for clinical trial execution and data management, including the Rave electronic data capture platform. Its products support sponsors, CROs, sites, and related systems in managing clinical study data and operations.
summary: mdsol.com exposes a documented Medidata Rave Web Services HTTP API on tenant subdomains, with Basic auth and Medidata MAuth signing; Medidata also publishes a Python client package (`rwslib`) for that API.
